hero.headline: Your digital life is invisible to the people who'd have to handle it.
hero.lede: Every account, device, and subscription your family would never find — inventoried, with instructions for what should happen to each. Offline, private, printable.
hero.note: Instant download · No subscription · No account · Works on Mac, Windows, tablets & phones

screens.caption: Every account with a what-should-happen plan.
It records the map, never the keys.

privacy.heading: Private by design, not by promise
privacy.body: Nothing you type ever leaves your device, and it never asks for a password by design.

cards.title: Zero network requests
cards.body: The app is a single file that runs entirely in your browser, on your device. It makes no connections and loads nothing from the internet. You can run it with Wi-Fi off.

cards.title: Never a password
cards.body: By design, it never asks for or stores passwords or PINs. It records that accounts exist and where your written instructions live — the map, never the keys.

cards.title: Yours forever
cards.body: One-time purchase. The file is yours, works offline for life, and will still open years from now, exactly as it does today.

priceCard.sub: third leg of the Estate Suite; the digital-life module the other two products point at.
bullets: 35 guided tasks across four phases: Map It, Devices & Access, Decide, Hand It Off
An account inventory with a what-should-happen decision for every account: transfer, memorialize, close, let lapse, or family decides
A device register: whose it is, where unlock info lives, what's on it that matters
A subscriptions register with a running monthly total — what your family would keep paying without this list
Key people in one place: digital executor, password manager emergency contact, legacy contacts
A Wishes section in your own words: social media, photos, email, creative work
A one-click printable "What My Family Needs to Know About My Digital Life" instruction sheet

faq.a: No. You pay 29 once and the app is yours forever. There is no account, no renewal, and nothing that expires.

faq.q: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a: No. You download a small file, double-click it, and it opens in the browser you already use — on Mac, Windows, tablets, and phones.
Yes, structurally. The app makes zero network requests — you can verify this with Wi-Fi turned off. Your entries live only on your device, and your backup is a file you control.

faq.q: What if it doesn't work for me?
faq.a: Email hello@quietkeep.co and we'll make it right. We answer every message.

crossSell.heading: Planning the rest of your estate, too?
crossSell.body: Third leg of the Estate Suite. Product #2's digital-accounts wish section is the seed this product grows; the pairing is designed.
